brief: Red panda cub discovers fresh bamboo shoot, 5s, 16:9 landscape

A.prompt: A young red panda cub approaches a fresh bamboo shoot in a mossy forest clearing at early morning. Its ears perk forward as it sniffs the shoot, whiskers twitching. It reaches out with a small paw, taps the green stalk — startles back as the stalk springs. Tail flicks. Anime style, soft morning light.

B.prompt:
Young red panda cub, 6 weeks. Neotenic: oversized head, stocky body, short legs, bushy ringed tail. Russet back, creamy face with black mask-markings, chocolate legs. Dark reflective eyes. Cautious gait.

Quiet bamboo grove, early morning. One fresh pale-green bamboo shoot in damp moss. Ground fog, dappled canopy light.

5 beats: (1) Pauses at moss edge, paw raised, weight back, tail curling. (2) Ears swivel forward, nose lifts, whisker twitches, pupils dilate. (3) Steps onto moss. (4) Taps stalk — shoot flexes and springs back; cub startles, body compresses, tail fluffs, ears pin back. (5) Ears lift, head tilts, sniffs again.

Register: traditional 2D Japanese hand-drawn animation, 90s-era cel-shaded, soft line-weight, watercolor backgrounds.

Color 60-30-10: forest greens, warm russets, cream accents.

Warm golden key upper-left, rim on fur, hero beam on shoot. Quiet wonder.

Audio: bamboo rustle, bird call, sniffs, step-pat on moss, whoosh as shoot springs.
